## Request

Describe the infrastructure or security engineering request.

## Environment Context

Describe relevant lab context, systems, constraints, and dependencies.

## Desired Outputs

- [ ] Architecture
- [ ] Implementation plan
- [ ] IaC skeletons
- [ ] Kubernetes manifests
- [ ] Ansible skeletons
- [ ] Validation checklist
- [ ] Rollback plan
- [ ] Threat model
- [ ] ADR
- [ ] ClickUp-style tasks

## Constraints

List any constraints.

## Approval Notes

Who needs to approve this before implementation?
